title: Philips’ new smart toothbrush shows you where you didn’t properly brush
summary: ﻿The toothbrush uses AI to track its movements and suggest areas of your mouth that may need a do-over. ﻿The toothbrush uses AI to track its movements and suggest areas of your mouth that may need a do-over.
